errors.PASSWORD_INSECURE: Password does not meet system security requirements
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least { minLength } character | Password must be at least { minLength } characters long
errors.PASSWORD_EXPOSED: This password was compromised in a data breach. Please choose another
errors.PASSWORD_TOP_10: This password is among the 10 most vulnerable. Create a more unique one
errors.PASSWORD_TOP_100: This password is among the 100 most vulnerable. Choose a stronger one
errors.PASSWORD_COMMON: Password is too common. Use a more unique combination
errors.PASSWORD_SIMILAR: Password resembles a commonly used one. Modify it for better security
errors.PASSWORD_IN_DICTIONARY: Password contains a dictionary word. Add numbers or symbols
errors.PASSWORD_HUMAN_NAME: Avoid using names or surnames in your password
errors.PASSWORD_DATE: Avoid using dates (birthdays, years) in your password
errors.PASSWORD_EXCESSIVE: Password is long enough — special characters are optional
